ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default arrow color, in any valid CSS notation. Use `var(--text-normal)` to default to black/white in light/dark mode.
ast.target: 默认箭头颜色，使用任何有效的 CSS 表示法。使用 `var(--text-normal)` 可在浅色/深色模式下默认为黑色/白色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of custom user-defined colors. Arrows whose color is set to a value in this list will have their color overridden by the specified value. Use the format custom-color-name: color, with each color separated by a new line. e.g. my-custom-color: #26edab
ast.target: 自定义用户定义颜色列表。颜色设置为此列表中某个值的箭头，其颜色将被指定值覆盖。使用格式 custom-color-name: color，每种颜色用新行分隔。例如：my-custom-color: #26edab

ast.name: warn
ast.source: mouseenter and mouseleave events polyfill is enabled.
ast.target: 已启用 mouseenter 和 mouseleave 事件 polyfill。
